_comment: Circuit Breaker -- prevents infinite or wasteful deliberation loops

duplicate_notebooklm_query.description: Same NotebookLM query issued twice with no score improvement

no_new_evidence.description: Consecutive rounds that added zero new wiki notes or manifest refs

contradiction_stall.description: Contradiction count did not decrease after N repair passes

score_plateau.description: Exit gate score unchanged for N consecutive rounds

max_rounds_exceeded.description: Total rounds exceeded the limit in exit_gate_policy

cooldown.description: Prevent re-deliberating the same query within this window
